@graph.name: Deepak Bunkar — Advocate
@graph.description: Deepak Bunkar is a practicing Advocate at the Jaipur District Court and Rajasthan High Court, representing clients in criminal defense, property disputes, divorce, writ petitions, and business litigation.

mainEntity.name: What legal services does Advocate Deepak Bunkar provide in Jaipur?

acceptedAnswer.text: Advocate Deepak Bunkar provides specialized legal representation and counsel across key practice areas including Criminal Law (bail, trial defense), Civil Litigation (property disputes, contract enforcement), Family & Matrimonial Law (divorce, custody), Constitutional Law (writ petitions before the High Court), and Corporate & Commercial advisory services.

mainEntity.name: How can I schedule a consultation at the Jaipur District Court office?

acceptedAnswer.text: Consultations can be scheduled by filling out the contact form below, calling the office directly at +91-7665304281, or emailing dbunkar533@gmail.com. Consultations are available both in-person at the Jaipur District Court chamber or virtually via phone/video conference.

mainEntity.name: Is Deepak Bunkar registered with the Bar Council of Rajasthan?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Advocate Deepak Bunkar is enrolled and registered with the Bar Council of Rajasthan (the state regulatory body under the Bar Council of India). This ensures he is fully licensed and authorized to practice law and represent clients before all sessions, district, and high courts in India.

mainEntity.name: Does the firm handle matters in the Rajasthan High Court?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, in addition to the Jaipur District & Sessions Court, Advocate Deepak Bunkar represents clients in the High Court of Judicature for Rajasthan (Jaipur Bench and Jodhpur Bench). This includes writ petitions, appeals, revisions, and constitutional matters.

mainEntity.name: What is the standard procedure when initiating a new legal case?

acceptedAnswer.text: Every matter begins with a thorough document audit and client interview to establish case facts. Advocate Bunkar then maps out the legal research, drafts a structured counter-argument brief, and establishes a clear timeline with the client before filing the case or presenting arguments in court.

mainEntity.name: How much does a lawyer charge in jaipur?

acceptedAnswer.text: Advocate Deepak Bunkar offers transparent legal consultation fee structures for Jaipur District Court and Rajasthan High Court matters. Fees depend on case complexity, document audits, and trial representation. Custom fee quotes are provided after initial consultation.

mainEntity.name: Can I fight a false 498a case india?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, false 498A, dowry harassment, or domestic violence cases can be contested legally in India by securing anticipatory bail, compiling comprehensive documentary proof of innocence, and applying to quash the false FIR in the High Court under Section 482 of CrPC.
